description: Change req-1 to mention OIDC compliance
newContent: The system shall support single sign-on (SSO) via SAML 2.0 and OpenID Connect (OIDC-compliant) for enterprise customers.

description: Mark task-2 as done (RBAC admin built)
Change the API response time threshold from 200ms to 150ms
newContent: API response times shall not exceed 150ms at the 95th percentile under normal load conditions (defined as 5000 concurrent users).

description: Update dec-1 to mention the migration from MySQL
newContent: We migrated from MySQL 8 to PostgreSQL 16 as the primary database for its mature JSONB support, full-text search, and strong transactional guarantees.
